channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Justice Department and DHS plan crackdown on 'birth tourism' after Supreme Court citizenship ruling
item.description: Senior officials said Wednesday they will seek ways to prevent pregnant women from entering the U.S. to exploit birthright citizenship.

item.title: Supreme Court to Decide Constitutionality of 'Assault Weapons' Bans
item.description: Plaintiffs argue that the term 'assault weapon' is a political slogan, not a meaningful designation.

item.title: Supreme Court Ruling Upholds Women's Sports and Legal Rights
item.description: The Court ruled that biological sex should not be replaced by gender identity.

item.title: Britain: Rearranging the Deck Chairs
item.description: The week of June 21, 2026: air conditioning, SpaceX, gas prices, and more.
